description_long: This is a rectangular, green plastic storage box with a ventilated design, featuring evenly spaced vertical and horizontal slats on all sides for airflow and visibility. The box has reinforced corners and horizontal ribs for added structural strength, making it suitable for carrying or storing moderately heavy items. There are integrated hand grips on the shorter sides, allowing for easy lifting and transport. The open-top design provides quick access to contents, while the flat base ensures stability when placed on the ground or stacked. The plastic material appears durable and weather-resistant, ideal for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. Its utilitarian appearance suggests use in markets, garages, warehouses, or for general storage and transport tasks.
description: A green, ventilated plastic storage box with reinforced corners, open top, and integrated hand grips for easy carrying. Its slatted design allows airflow and visibility, making it suitable for urban storage and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long side with vertical and horizontal slats and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the short side with a rectangular hand grip cutout and slatted design.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, with slatted panels and no handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the short side with a hand grip cutout and slats.
attribute_handle_design: integrated hand grips on short sides
